name: Cataracts - Diagnosis Code Query (Multi-Type, Multi-Laterality)
description: **First standalone lens disorder phenotype.** Tests ability to find cataract patients via diagnosis codes by laterality (bilateral vs unilateral) and morphology (nuclear). Synthea distributes patients across these subtypes.
prompt: Find all patients with a diagnosis of cataracts, including bilateral cataracts, unilateral cataracts, and nuclear cataracts.

prompts.broad: Find all patients diagnosed with any form of cataract — including the parent cataract concept, bilateral cataracts (both eyes affected), unilateral cataracts (one eye affected), and nuclear cataracts (the most common age-related morphology).
prompts.expert: I need to identify all cataract patients. Cataracts are documented under multiple SNOMED codes: Cataract (193570009) is the parent disorder, with laterality variants Bilateral cataracts (95722004) and Unilateral cataract (95721006), plus morphology-specific Nuclear cataract (53889007). Search Condition resources for these codes.

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with cataract diagnosis codes. **First standalone lens disorder phenotype.** Tests laterality + morphology code variation.
